data.en: It was Daming's birthday yesterday.
data.cn: 昨天是大明的生日。
data.hint: 注意所有格 Daming's 和过去式 was。
accept: Yesterday it was Daming's birthday.

data.en: He got many presents from his family and friends.
data.cn: 他收到了来自家人和朋友的许多礼物。
data.hint: got 是 get 的过去式；many 修饰可数名词复数。
accept: He got many presents from his friends and family.

data.en: Simon's mum bought him a present too.
data.cn: 西蒙的妈妈也给他买了一份礼物。
data.hint: bought 是 buy 的过去式；too 用于句尾表示“也”。

data.en: It was a book about space travel.
data.cn: 那是一本关于太空旅行的书。
data.hint: about 表示“关于”。

data.en: Daming is very interested in space travel.
data.cn: 大明对太空旅行非常感兴趣。
data.hint: be interested in 对...感兴趣。

data.en: He loves the present very much.
data.cn: 他非常喜欢这份礼物。
data.hint: love ... very much 非常喜欢...
accept: Very much he loves the present.

data.en: Daming showed Simon his birthday present.
data.cn: 大明给西蒙看了他的生日礼物。
data.hint: show sb sth 给某人看某物。
accept: Daming showed his birthday present to Simon.

data.en: Simon was interested in the book too.
data.cn: 西蒙也对这本书感兴趣。
data.hint: was 是过去式，对应 Simon。

data.en: Daming asked him to read the book with him.
data.cn: 大明请他和他一起读这本书。
data.hint: ask sb to do sth 请某人做某事。

data.en: In the book, they saw many pictures of spaceships.
data.cn: 在书里，他们看到了许多宇宙飞船的照片。
data.hint: saw 是 see 的过去式；pictures of ...的照片。
accept: They saw many pictures of spaceships in the book.

data.en: They learnt a lot about space travel.
data.cn: 他们学到了很多关于太空旅行的知识。
data.hint: learnt 是 learn 的过去式（英式写法）。
accept: A lot they learnt about space travel.

data.en: Daming and Simon finished the book.
data.cn: 大明和西蒙读完了这本书。
data.hint: finish 意为“完成/结束”。
accept: Simon and Daming finished the book.

data.en: Then they decided to make a paper spaceship together.
data.cn: 然后他们决定一起做一个纸宇宙飞船。
data.hint: decide to do sth 决定做某事；together 一起。
accept: They decided to make a paper spaceship together then.

data.en: They gave the spaceship to Simon's mum.
data.cn: 他们把飞船给了西蒙的妈妈。
data.hint: give sth to sb 把某物给某人。
accept: They gave Simon's mum the spaceship.

data.en: Daming thanked her for the birthday present.
data.cn: 大明谢谢她送的生日礼物。
data.hint: thank sb for sth 因某事感谢某人。

data.en: She was very happy.
data.cn: 她非常高兴。
data.hint: was 对应 she。

data.en: Welcome home!
data.cn: 欢迎回家！
data.hint: welcome ... 欢迎...。

data.en: What did you buy on the earth?
data.cn: 你在地球上买了什么？
data.hint: did 引导过去式的疑问句。

data.en: I bought a lot of things.
data.cn: 我买了很多东西。
data.hint: bought 是 buy 的过去式。
accept: A lot of things I bought.

data.en: This T-shirt is for you.
data.cn: 这件T恤衫是送给你的。
data.hint: be for sb 送给某人的。

data.en: Daming and Simon made a model of a Chinese spaceship.
data.cn: 大明和西蒙做了一个中国宇宙飞船的模型。
data.hint: made 是 make 的过去式；a model of ...的一个模型。
accept: Simon and Daming made a model of a Chinese spaceship.

data.en: The name of the spaceship is Shenzhou V.
data.cn: 这艘宇宙飞船的名字叫神舟五号。
data.hint: the name of ...的名字。

data.en: Look at our spaceship.
data.cn: 看我们的宇宙飞船。
data.hint: look at 看...。

data.en: It took us to the earth.
data.cn: 它把我们带到了地球。
data.hint: took 是 take 的过去式；take sb to ...把某人带到某地。

data.en: And it brought back our presents.
data.cn: 并且它带回了我们的礼物。
data.hint: brought back 带回。

data.en: The earth goes around the sun.
data.cn: 地球绕着太阳转。
data.hint: goes around 围绕...转；sun和earth前要加the。
accept: Around the sun the earth goes.

data.en: You travel to space in a spaceship.
data.cn: 你乘宇宙飞船去太空旅行。
data.hint: travel to ... 去某地旅行；in a spaceship 乘飞船。
accept: In a spaceship you travel to space.

data.en: She bought an interesting book about space travel.
data.cn: 她买了一本关于太空旅行的有趣的书。
data.hint: interesting 以元音音素开头，前面用 an。

data.en: Shenzhou V took the national flag of China.
data.cn: 神舟五号携带了中国的国旗。
data.hint: national flag 国旗。

data.en: In 2003, it took a Chinese taikonaut into space.
data.cn: 2003年，它把一位中国航天员送入太空。
data.hint: take ... into space 把...送入太空。
accept: It took a Chinese taikonaut into space in 2003.

data.en: It took a Chinese taikonaut into space for the first time.
data.cn: 它第一次把一位中国航天员送入太空。
data.hint: for the first time 第一次。

data.en: It took the national flag of China and some seeds too.
data.cn: 它也携带了中国国旗和一些种子。
data.hint: some seeds 一些种子。
accept: It took some seeds and the national flag of China too.

data.en: The spaceship took us to the earth.
data.cn: 宇宙飞船把我们带到了地球。
data.hint: take sb to ... 把某人带到某地。

data.en: They saw many pictures of spaceships from China.
data.cn: 他们看到了许多来自中国的宇宙飞船的照片。
data.hint: pictures of ... 的照片；from ... 来自...
accept: They saw many pictures of spaceships from Russia and the US too.

data.en: They saw pictures from China, Russia and the US.
data.cn: 他们看到了来自中国、俄罗斯和美国的照片。
data.hint: 注意国家名称的首字母大写。
accept: They saw pictures from Russia, China and the US.

data.en: Daming and Simon made a paper spaceship together.
data.cn: 大明和西蒙一起做了一个纸宇宙飞船。
data.hint: paper spaceship 纸宇宙飞船。
accept: Together Daming and Simon made a paper spaceship.

data.en: They gave the spaceship to Simon's mum.
data.cn: 他们把飞船给了西蒙的妈妈。
data.hint: give sth to sb 把某物给某人。
accept: They gave Simon's mum the spaceship.

data.en: Yesterday was Daming's birthday.
data.cn: 昨天是大明的生日。
data.hint: Yesterday 作主语。
accept: It was Daming's birthday yesterday.

data.en: He loves the present very much.
data.cn: 他非常喜欢这份礼物。
data.hint: love ... very much 非常喜欢...

data.en: Simon was interested in the book too.
data.cn: 西蒙也对这本书感兴趣。
data.hint: was 对应 Simon。

data.en: They learnt a lot about space travel in the book.
data.cn: 他们在书中学到了很多关于太空旅行的知识。
data.hint: learnt 是 learn 的过去式；in the book 在书里。
accept: In the book, they learnt a lot about space travel.

data.en: Daming showed his birthday present to Simon.
data.cn: 大明把他的生日礼物给西蒙看。
data.hint: show sth to sb 给某人看某物。
accept: Daming showed Simon his birthday present.

data.en: The name of the spaceship is Shenzhou V.
data.cn: 飞船的名字是神舟五号。
data.hint: Shenzhou V 神舟五号。

data.en: In 2003, Shenzhou V took a taikonaut into space.
data.cn: 2003年，神舟五号把一位航天员送入太空。
data.hint: took ... into space 把...送入太空。
accept: Shenzhou V took a taikonaut into space in 2003.

data.en: It carried the national flag and some seeds.
data.cn: 它携带了国旗和一些种子。
data.hint: carry 携带；seeds 种子（复数）。
accept: It took the national flag and some seeds.

data.en: Daming thanked her for the birthday present.
data.cn: 大明因这份生日礼物向她表示感谢。
data.hint: thank sb for sth 因...感谢某人。

data.en: They decided to make a model spaceship together.
data.cn: 他们决定一起做一个飞船模型。
data.hint: decide to do sth 决定做某事。
accept: They decided to make a paper spaceship together.

data.en: The earth travels around the sun.
data.cn: 地球绕着太阳运行。
data.hint: travels 对应 the earth；around 围绕。
accept: The earth goes around the sun.

data.en: Look at our model spaceship.
data.cn: 看我们的模型宇宙飞船。
data.hint: look at 看...。

data.en: Simon's mum was very happy with the spaceship.
data.cn: 西蒙的妈妈对这个宇宙飞船感到非常高兴。
data.hint: be happy with 对...感到高兴。
